headline: HEAVY SLOP WARNING: AUTO-GENERATED PRODUCT-DESCRIPTION FRONT INUNDATES THE MARKETPLACE MARSHES AS SYNTHETIC LISTINGS PRAISE ITEMS THEY CANNOT ACCURATELY IDENTIFY
advisory: A broad, slow-moving system of machine-written product copy has settled over the retail lowlands, saturating listings faster than any human could plausibly have handled a single one of these items. Residents are advised that a coffee mug described as 'a versatile solution for your busy lifestyle and also your business needs' is neither versatile nor aware of what it is. The Service reminds shoppers that a bullet point promising 'premium quality durable material made from material' is not a specification. Purchase with caution; verify by photograph, not by prose.

regional_outlook.conditions: Dense listing fog across all categories, reducing product visibility to near zero. Expect a garden hose described as 'perfect for professionals and beginners alike, ideal for indoor and outdoor and everywhere.'
Standing spam accumulating in the shopping tabs, with duplicate listings drifting in identical phrasing. Comparison shopping is not advised until waters recede.
Scattered 'handmade' banners over inventory the seller has plainly never touched. Handcrafted authenticity remains at record lows.
Cart-abandonment reminders arriving for carts never abandoned, generated by systems reminding you of a decision you did not make.
Persistent haze of five-word feature summaries. A calculator app now claims to 'empower your journey.'

specimen.status: Explosive population growth; now the dominant vegetation of the retail lowlands.
specimen.habitat: Marketplace listing pages, third-party seller storefronts, and the scrollable void beneath the 'Buy Now' button.
specimen.field_marks: Fluent, confident, and profoundly uninformed. Repeats the same adjective three times. Praises benefits no physical object could provide. Frequently unsure whether it is describing a spatula, a phone case, or a state of mind.
specimen.call: This premium high-quality durable product is perfect for all your needs and also many other needs, providing a versatile solution for the whole family and professionals.
specimen.confusion_species: Easily mistaken for a genuine manufacturer description written by a tired human. Tell them apart by specificity: a real description knows the product's dimensions; the Blurb knows only that dimensions are, in general, a thing products have.

spotter_tip: If a listing praises the item without ever once naming a concrete feature — no size, no material, no measurable claim — you are reading generated fog, not a description. Scroll to the photos and trust your own eyes.
tomorrow: Product-copy fog persisting into Friday, with a chance of review-section runoff pooling beneath the worst-affected listings.

confirmed_sighting.report: A year-end report describes AI slop reaching a new peak in 2025, citing intrusive bots and absurd e-commerce product summaries flooding search engines and shopping platforms with automated spam.
